_meta.purpose: Policy gate for EXTERNAL-agent delegation actions, enforced at the delegation boundary by scripts/ai/lib/agent_action_policy.py. Governs the one thing the harness controls when launching an external CLI: the execution MODE (sandbox/approval posture). Path/shell allowlists inside a run are enforced by the agent's own sandbox, not here.
_meta.notes: Defaults preserve current behavior (privileged modes allowed + audited) so automation is not broken. Tighten by setting global.privileged_requires_authorization=true (then privileged modes need the authorization env), or add a mode to an agent's blocked_modes for an instant central kill-switch with no script edits.

codex.privileged_reason: edit -> --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox: arbitrary shell + edits with no per-action approval.

gemini.privileged_reason: yolo -> auto-approves ALL tool calls including run_shell_command (no approval prompt).

antigravity.note: Inference-only via the switchboard; no local shell execution, so no privileged execution mode to gate.
